block.text: Lose 2 STAMINA points. Dazed and bleeding, you are pulled from the wreckage of your robot. 'This is the trouble-maker, all right!' you hear one Karossean say. You do not have time to use medikits right now! If you possess a Karossean uniform, turn to 241. If not, turn to 89.

choice.text: If you possess a Karossean uniform.
